newsSince: No material company-specific news since June 9. The Onconetix reverse-takeover Nasdaq listing (parent retains 75-90%) is still pending close by October 2026, and the Las Vegas facility relocation was on track for end-June; stock fell ~9% with no new fundamental catalyst.

verdicts.rankRationale: Humanoid-stack lens: no new commercialization evidence since June 9 - RTO still pending (Oct), relocation in progress, revenue tiny ($0.35M/qtr, net loss). The directness is real but micro-cap scale, -42% YTD and dilution/execution risk keep it below purer, better-capitalized humanoid builders.
verdicts.bull: Directest deployed social-robot micro-cap with a Nasdaq path via Onconetix.
verdicts.neutral: Real but tiny; thesis intact yet commercialization unproven.
verdicts.bear: $40M cap, deep losses, RTO/dilution risk; alpha is mostly humanoid beta.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Nasdaq RTO close; first scaled deployments
